meta.title: About
meta.description: Learn about {brand}'s mission, vision, core values, and approach to building digital solutions that structure and grow businesses.

header.title: About {brand}
header.subtitle: A technology-driven company that builds digital solutions and creates scalable products — with clarity, quality, and purpose.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.title: Solving Real Problems, Not Just Delivering Software
mission.p1: To help businesses build solid digital foundations that make their work easier, clearer, and more efficient.
mission.p2: {brand} designs and builds websites, mobile applications, and internal business systems for clients. These services help organisations establish or improve their digital presence, digitalise internal processes, and gain efficiency, clarity, and operational control.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.title: From Digital Services to Venture Building
vision.p1: To grow from a digital services company into a venture-building organisation that both serves clients through high-quality solutions and creates scalable digital products.
vision.p2: {brand} follows a dual-growth approach: services generate revenue and market understanding, while products generate scalability and long-term value. Both pillars are essential and reinforce each other.

values.title: Core Values
values.subtitle: These values guide all decisions, collaborations, and projects. They are non-negotiable and define who we are.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: Clear communication, clear scope, clear expectations. No ambiguity in work or relationships.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: Commitments are respected. Deadlines are taken seriously. Quality is consistent. Trust is a core asset.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: Simple solutions are preferred. Complexity must always be justified. Systems should be understandable by users.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.description: We take responsibility for our work. Mistakes are acknowledged and corrected. Every project is a reference.

ethics.title: Ethical Work
ethics.description: Honest pricing, transparent communication, respect for all stakeholders. No deceptive or harmful practices.

story.title: The Story Behind {brand}
story.p1: {brand} was born from a simple observation: too many businesses struggle with digital tools that don't fit their needs. Off-the-shelf solutions are often too generic, and custom development is often too chaotic.
story.p2: We set out to bridge that gap — building structured, clear, and reliable digital solutions that truly serve the businesses they're made for. Not rushed. Not over-engineered. Just right.
story.p3: As we grew, we noticed patterns: problems that kept coming back across different clients. That's when the idea of building our own products emerged. Today, {brand} operates on two pillars — serving clients and building scalable products — each reinforcing the other.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
believe: Growth is pursued with patience and alignment

meta.title: Services
meta.description: {brand} offers web development, mobile applications, business digitalization, and SaaS & custom systems. Discover how we can help your business grow.

header.title: Our Services
header.subtitle: We build digital solutions that solve real problems. Each service is designed to help your business gain clarity, efficiency, and growth.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.problem: Many businesses rely on outdated, poorly designed websites that fail to represent their brand or convert visitors. Others have no web presence at all.
webDev.solution: We design and develop custom websites and web applications using modern technologies — responsive, fast, SEO-optimized, and built to scale.
webDev.benefit: A professional digital presence that works for your business 24/7, attracting clients and building trust.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.problem: Users expect seamless mobile experiences. A clunky app or the absence of one means lost engagement and revenue.
mobile.solution: We build native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android, focused on performance, usability, and real user needs.
mobile.benefit: A powerful mobile tool that keeps your users engaged, simplifies processes, and opens new revenue channels.

digital.title: Business Digitalization
digital.problem: Manual processes, paper-based systems, and disconnected tools slow businesses down, create errors, and limit growth.
digital.solution: We analyse your workflows and build digital systems that automate, organize, and connect your operations.
digital.benefit: Streamlined operations, reduced errors, better data visibility, and time saved for what matters most.

saas.title: SaaS & Custom Systems
saas.problem: Off-the-shelf software rarely fits complex or unique business needs. Customization options are limited, and costs add up.
saas.solution: We design and build scalable SaaS platforms and custom systems tailored to your exact requirements — owned and controlled by you.
saas.benefit: A proprietary system that fits your business perfectly, grows with you, and gives you full control.

cta.title: Need a Custom Solution?
cta.subtitle: Every business is unique. Let's discuss your specific challenges and find the right approach together.

meta.description: Explore {brand}'s portfolio of digital projects — websites, mobile apps, business systems, and SaaS platforms built with quality and purpose.

header.title: Our Work
header.subtitle: Every project is treated as a reference of the brand. Here are some of the digital solutions we've built.

portfolio.moreComingSoon: More projects coming soon. We document every build with care.

projects.title: Healthy Living Association (H.L.A)
projects.description: A modern, professional website for a nonprofit focused on preventive healthcare and community health education in Cameroon.
projects.aim: Build a modern, professional web presence for a nonprofit organization focused on preventive healthcare and community health education in Cameroon.

projects.title: TAMWIL — Personal Finance Manager
projects.description: A privacy-first, cross-platform personal finance app built with Flutter. 100% offline architecture with comprehensive financial tracking and analytics.
projects.aim: Provide a privacy-first personal finance management app that works 100% offline, ensuring user data never leaves their device.
features: Detailed expense categorization with custom categories

projects.title: Djangi — Cotisation Manager
projects.description: A mobile-first PWA for managing tontine/djangi group savings — a community-based savings tradition in Central & West Africa.
projects.aim: Digitize and simplify the management of informal community savings groups (djangi/tontines), replacing handwritten paper ledgers with a secure, offline-capable, mobile-friendly app.
features: End-to-end encrypted Google Drive backup & sync
PIN lock security for app access
